selene.core.exceptions.TimeoutException: Message: 

Timed out after 4s, while waiting for:
browser.element(('css selector', 'body')).element(('css selector', '.recommended_items')).element(('xpath', "//div[contains(@class,'productinfo') and ./p[text()='Stylish Dress']]")).element(('css selector', '.add-to-cart')).click

Reason: ElementClickInterceptedException: Element <a class="btn btn-default add-to-cart"> is not clickable at point (826,978) because another element <iframe id="aswift_4" name="aswift_4" src="https://googleads.g.doubleclick.net/pagead/html/r20260129/r20190131/zrt_lookup_fy2021.html#RS-3-&adk=1812271801&client=ca-pub-1677597403311019&fa=1&ifi=5&uci=a!5&btvi=3"> obscures it; For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception
Screenshot: file:///root/.selene/screenshots/1769744215785/1769744215785.png
PageSource: file:///root/.selene/screenshots/1769744215785/1769744215785.html
[WEB Component] Add product to cart from product carousel
